entity.summary: Permissionless fully onchain central-limit-order-book decentralized exchange on Solana offering zero-fee spot trading, market creation, composable interfaces, and developer APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party website, live application, and open-source repository identify Manifest as a permissionless fully onchain Solana order-book exchange with zero maker and taker fees, market creation, composable program architecture, formal-verification work, and developer interfaces. Current independently maintained metrics report substantial non-zero spot DEX volume and TVL. Marketing descriptions compare Manifest with earlier Solana order books, but no formal predecessor or successor relationship is asserted in this record.

evidence.title: About Manifest — The Unlimited Orderbook
evidence.notes: First-party website describes Manifest as a fully onchain Solana central-limit-order-book exchange with zero trading fees, permissionless markets, composable architecture, open-source code, and a live trading interface.

evidence.title: Manifest Trade protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report substantial non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day spot DEX volume together with TVL, supporting active classification.
